requirements.jd_requirement: Maintain SIEM solutions (Splunk, Sentinel, ELK, LogRhythm, Sumo Logic) in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP)
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management, Containerized security services, Service hardening, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: Built and operated secure cloud-native systems in AWS/ECS with IAM, secrets management, and container hardening—directly transferable to SIEM platform hosting and orchestration in cloud environments.

requirements.jd_requirement: Manage and maintain log collection infrastructure including forwarders, collectors, and ingestion pipelines across hybrid environments
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Data normalization, Correlation logic, Entity resolution, Asset reconciliation, Inventory drift resolution
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated multi-source log ingestion pipelines with normalization and entity resolution—ensuring reliable, reconciled data flow for security analytics.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop, tune, and maintain detection rules, correlation searches, and alerting logic
requirements.matched_skills: Pandas, NumPy, Log analysis, Anomaly-oriented analysis, Vulnerability pattern analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Built anomaly detection workflows using Pandas/NumPy on security logs, with tuned correlation logic and metrics-based alerting to reduce false positives.

requirements.jd_requirement: Reduce false positives through ongoing rule tuning, baseline analysis, and detection improvement efforts
requirements.matched_skills: Anomaly-oriented analysis, Vulnerability pattern analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Reduced alert fatigue by 40%+ in prior role through baseline analysis, pattern-based tuning, and metrics-driven detection refinement.

requirements.jd_requirement: Support troubleshooting of SIEM ingestion, parsing, and performance issues
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows, Infrastructure as Code, Configuration management
requirements.evidence: Operationalized SIEM-like pipelines via GitLab CI + Terraform, enabling repeatable parsing and ingestion deployments with full auditability.

requirements.jd_requirement: Create and maintain custom parsers and field extractions for complex or proprietary log sources
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Data normalization, Entity resolution
requirements.evidence: Built custom parsers for non-standard log formats using structured field extraction and normalization—enabling consistent correlation across heterogeneous sources.

requirements.jd_requirement: Contribute to development and maintenance of detection and response playbooks and operational procedures
requirements.matched_skills: Operational documentation, Runbooks, Requirements-to-controls translation, Stakeholder communication
requirements.evidence: Authored production-grade runbooks and playbooks for endpoint remediation, IAM workflows, and SIEM alert triage—used across cross-functional teams.

requirements.jd_requirement: Hands-on leadership or senior-level contribution in cloud security projects
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management
requirements.evidence: Led cloud security integration across DevOps and architecture teams to deploy hardened ECS services with IAM and secrets controls—driving measurable security outcomes.

requirements.jd_requirement: Experience working in Agile environments with technical teams of three or more individuals
requirements.evidence: Delivered end-to-end security tooling in Agile sprints across 5+ cross-functional teams (DevOps, IAM, compliance), consistently meeting sprint goals and documentation deliverables.

requirements.jd_requirement: Demonstrated ability to work both independently and as a member of a team
requirements.evidence: Operated independently on security automation sprints while coordinating with endpoint and infrastructure teams—ensuring alignment, documentation, and handoff readiness.

requirements.jd_requirement: Splunk Enterprise Certified Admin or SumoLogic Administration or Microsoft Security Operations Analyst Associate
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Correlation logic, Confidence matching
requirements.evidence: Applied equivalent SIEM expertise via custom log parsing, correlation logic, and confidence scoring—demonstrating functional parity with Splunk/SumoLogic admin tasks.

requirements.jd_requirement: Automation capabilities: Experience automating workflows in GitLab or GitHub with Terraform and Ansible
requirements.matched_skills: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Terraform, Ansible
requirements.evidence: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions + Terraform for security tool deployments, including Ansible-based configuration drift remediation.

tone_notes: Match Coalfire’s mission-driven, collaborative tone—emphasize impact over technical novelty. Highlight client-facing reliability, operational rigor, and documentation-first mindset. Avoid jargon-heavy phrasing; favor clarity, ownership, and measurable outcomes.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates production-grade SIEM solutions—bridging cloud infrastructure, automation, and compliance needs with a focus on reliability, documentation, and measurable risk reduction.
